content:
**Primary Goal:** Convert raw creative mass into a filterable, recursive operating system by separating and clarifying the relationships between:

- ARTIST IDs vs PROJECTS
- REALITY vs SURREAL/DREAM domains
- EDUCATION, RESEARCH, BUSINESS, and PRODUCT layers
- GLYPHS, SYMBOLS, and FILTERABLE TAGS
- Modular Export Formatting (mobile and GitHub-ready)

---

### I. | ARTIST ID vs PROJECT: Taxonomy Definition

| CATEGORY | DEFINITION | EXAMPLES |
|--------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| ARTIST ID | A role or creative voice used to generate and filter work | ::4_bl00m, ::ETCETER4 |
| PROJECT | A self-contained system or world produced through one or more artist IDs | ::MET4morfoses, ::GR1ND3R, ::Q_v33R |
